description: Background options for Rolemaster character creation — merged from Character Law, Companions I & III
generated_notes: Character Law + Companion I: extracted by Claude from PDFs and normalized tables
Companion II: confirmed by GPT as having no background options section
Companion III: section 5.3 Innate Stat Abilities extracted and normalized by GPT
Version 3: normalized entry schema, cleaned OCR corruption, added Character Law item/status fixes, and translated Companion III entries.
Kept all 333 source entries present in the merged file; source-summary counts in the prompt were internally inconsistent with the file contents.

sources.name: Character Law
sources.reference: RM Classic / RM2 Character Law, Chapter 6

entries.description_en: +15 bonus for any secondary skill
+10 bonus for any primary skill
+1 Spell Adder

entries.name_en: A language to skill rank 10 spoken and written
entries.name_fr: Une langue au rang 10 (parlé et écrit)
entries.description_en: A language to skill rank 10 spoken and written

entries.name_en: Increase one stat by 2 or three stats by 1 each (temp and pot, max 101)
entries.name_fr: +2 à une stat OU +1 à trois stats (temp et pot, max 101)
entries.description_en: Increase one stat by 2 or three stats by 1 each (temp and pot, max 101)

entries.name_en: Skill rank 5 in a random secondary skill (or GM chosen)
entries.name_fr: Rang 5 dans une compétence secondaire aléatoire (ou choisie par le MJ)
entries.description_en: Skill rank 5 in a random secondary skill (or GM chosen)
Mannish Appearance (optional - for orcs/trolls)

entries.name_en: Unusual Tongue (optional - speak a normally impossible language)
entries.name_fr: Langue inhabituelle (optionnel - parler une langue normalement impossible)
entries.description_en: Unusual Tongue (optional - speak a normally impossible language)

entries.name_en: Offset Racial Flaw (optional - cancel one racial flaw)
entries.description_en: Offset Racial Flaw (optional - cancel one racial flaw)
The character has a neutral body odor that is hard to detect or track.
The character possesses a remarkable vocal tone that aids singing.
The character has a sharply developed sense of smell.
The character can see heat signatures in darkness.
The character has an exceptional voice that aids singing and leadership.
The character senses emotional states more readily than normal.
The character has an unusually keen sense of hearing.
The character judges space, distance, and orientation exceptionally well.
The character is naturally nimble and gains an Agility bonus.
The character radiates personal magnetism and gains a Presence bonus.
The character moves with resilient, springy tendons.
The character has increased lung capacity and endurance.
The character thinks quickly and gains a Reasoning bonus.
The character reacts with exceptional speed in dangerous situations.
The character withstands pain and shock better than normal.
The character has exceptionally high agility.
The character moves quietly and gains a Stalk/Hide bonus.
The character has exceptional physical strength.
The character is affected by lycanthropy; exact handling is determined by the GM.
The character has heightened resistance to hostile effects.
The character has a minor innate magical attunement.
The character has a major innate magical attunement.
One bread, poison, or herb from the Enchanted Herbs, Breads, and Poisons Price Table (pp. 113-118). The GM may require a random roll or permit the PC to select one.
A +5 bonus magic item* of the player's choice.
A +10 bonus magic item* of the player's choice from the Accessory Price Table (p. 108).
A +10 bonus non-magic item** of the player's choice.

entries.name_fr: Objet Magique +10 ou Ajouteur de Sort +1
entries.description_en: A +10 bonus magic item* of the player's choice or a +1 spell adder item***.
A Daily I spell item****.

entries.name_en: +15 Non-Magic Item or x2 Spell Multiplier
entries.name_fr: Objet Non Magique +15 ou Multiplicateur x2
entries.description_en: A +15 bonus non-magic item** of the player's choice or a x2 spell multiplier item.

entries.name_fr: Objet Magique +15 ou Ajouteur de Sort +2
entries.description_en: A +15 bonus magic item* of the player's choice or a +2 spell adder item***.
A Daily II spell item****.
A +20 bonus non-magic item** of the player's choice or a x2 spell multiplier item or a +3 spell adder item***.
A Daily III spell item****.
A Daily IV spell item****.
A +25 bonus magic item* of the player's choice or a x3 spell multiplier item or a +4 spell adder item***.
One loyal unusual creature (e.g., a monster).
1 gp
2 gp
3 gp
4 gp
5 gp
10 gp
15 gp
20 gp
25 gp
30 gp
35 gp
10 gems worth 10 gp each
40 gp
50 gp
60 gp
70 gp
80 gp
100 gp
6 gems worth 20 gp each
15 gems worth 10 gp each
Income of 5 gp/month*
Income of 10 gp/month*
The character or family is marked by a curse.
The character comes from an exceptionally impoverished family.
The character comes from a criminal background.
The character comes from a guild background.
The character has a multi-cultural and multi-linguistic background.
The character has a special rapport with animals.
The character has a special rapport with another race.
The character possesses royal blood.
The character or family is tied to a conspiracy.
The character's family is rich.
Events tied to luck or happenstance favor the character by 20%.
All bleeding results are doubled.
Base (40 - SD Mod)% chance of responding to insult or offense with a killing fit.
Accused of Murder, Banditry, Assassination, Theft, Assault, or Treason.
PC experiences severe guilt if he causes the death or injury of a human, Elf, Hobbit, or Dwarf.
Will never fight in an unchivalrous manner; always gives opponent first initiative, never fights horseback vs foot, always allows enemy to rearm.
Base (40 - SD Mod)% chance of charging heedless into a combat situation.
PC is victim of a terrible phobia. Details determined by the GM.
The PC is a faithful vassal to a very wicked Lord or Lady.
The PC is superstitious: his morale is influenced by bad 'omens'.
-15 to all OB's until he gets 'worked up'. May roll once each turn, (20 + SD Mod)% chance.
If non-monk, may train in Martial Arts, Adrenal Moves, and Adrenal Defense as if he were a Monk. If Monk, no penalty when using weapon kata.
25% increase to all bow ranges.
Stalk and Hide skill bonus modified by +25.
+25 modification to all Adrenal Moves rolls.
+25 bonus to riding bonuses.
The PC has been knighted for a personal act of heroism on behalf of a noble or royalty.
All armor development costs are cut in half.
May run at up to 3x normal movement rate and spend only 1 exhaustion point every 60 rounds.
May develop skill ranks in one similar weapons category; all weapons in that category may use that skill rank for their OB's.
Ambush development costs are cut in half.
Half development point cost for Body Development. Maximum racial body hits are increased by 50%.
Hands hit as maces when using MA Strikes skill; treat as a 'Mace' weapon kata with no penalty.
May modify any die roll directly concerning the character by either +5 or -5.
One selected category of weapons yields 3 skill ranks for every 2 developed. All other weapon dev costs increased by 50%.
May intentionally attempt to disarm opponent. Subtract enemy OB from PC OB; add open-ended roll; if 101+ enemy must roll RR vs PC level or lose weapon.
Immune to fear and charm attacks. Sleep attacks are halved for attack level and duration.
May take 150% of total hit points before becoming unconscious.
PC's injuries heal twice as quickly as normal.
Resists magic at 3x level. May not use spells or spell devices.
Vegetarian; has (35 + Em Mod)% chance each round of befriending any animal within 10' if concentrating. May not control animal, but animal will act friendly.
Has an open-ended chance equal to his IN modification to receive information directly from the GM concerning an immediate tactical situation.
Readies weapons and bows 1 round quicker than normal.
May make MA Rank 1 Sweeps/Throws attack each round in addition to normal action.
GM may warn of general danger on a roll less than or equal to the PC's IN modification.
PC may make perception rolls to wake and take action immediately from normal sleep.
Those who are allies, troops, or henchmen under the PC never panic while he is well & in sight.
PC may prepare as for the adrenal move 'Strength' except that his chance of success is his level + ((SD Mod + EM Mod)/2). If he succeeds, his OB and DB are modified by +15 for the next round.
Gets +50 to all forage, fire starting, and locate shelter rolls while outdoors. +20 to all Tracking, Trapping, and Stalk/Hide rolls while outdoors.
Encumbrance Penalties are halved for the PC.
Liked by a very high ranking noble. May be a relative.
PC enjoys the favor of a particular god, demi-god, angel, etc.
May determine the pluses or minuses, magical and non-magical, on weapons and armor.
When using entire OB to parry, the OB is modified by an additional +25.
+15 to AG modification.
+15 to SD modification.
+15 to QU modification.
+15 to CO modification.
+15 to ST modification.
+20 to AG modification.
+20 to SD modification.
+20 to QU modification.
+20 to CO modification.
+20 to ST modification.
+20 to AG, SD, QU, CO, or ST modification (GM choice: assign, PC choice, or random).
PC is tempted to the 'Dark Side'. He learns one Evil spell list to 50th level. GM controls details.
Roll non-attack spell failures as attack spell failures. Add +10 to the roll for attack spell failures.
Deep irrational hatred for one GM chosen race.
Subject to temporary fits of demonic possession. Weekly chance = 5%.
This is the uncontrollable, bestial, psychotic type.
PC becomes a lich or powerful vampire when his soul departs his body.
Any time the PC casts a spell that is over 8th level, the PC suffers 5 points concussion damage.
Instead of following normal attack spell failure procedure, the attack works on the nearest friend or associate within range.
The PC has the disfavor of a particular god, demi-god, demon, etc.
PC has uncontrollable split personality. Must prepare character sheets for 1-3 additional personalities. Stats, levels, classes can vary.
PC is not penalized for wearing armor while casting spells.
+10 bonus on Base Attack or Elemental Spell rolls.
PC receives a +25 bonus for RR's for any 1 realm.
PC knows any 1 spell list to 50th level. May be from any realm or profession.
PC requires one less round of preparation than normal to cast a spell.
PC gets +25 on all Staves/Wands rolls.
PC gets +25 on all scrolls and runes rolls.
PC gets +25 bonus to his meditation skill bonus.
PC gets one additional power point each level.
Concentration spells continue after the caster ceases concentrating for a period equal to the number of rounds he originally spent concentrating.
PC has abilities similar to an Archmage. Dev point costs are now the same as any one hybrid spell user. Base lists don't change, but may make spell picks as a hybrid for all three realms.
PC may see invisible or ethereal items if he concentrates.
PC's neck hairs prickle around a great power source, enchanted location, etc.
PC receives spontaneous glimpses of events associated with a place, person, item, etc. that he touches.
May learn the Arcane Spell Lists as if they were his base lists.
PC has a high-level non-alchemist magic user as a good friend.
As '26' except friend is an Alchemist who will make or sell items to the PC for 51-100% of normal cost.
10% chance of determining each ability of a magic item. Roll each characteristic.
Without a spell bonus item or with a PP adder, the PC normally has 2x normal Power Points. If using a PP multiplier, the bonus increases 1 level (x2→x3, etc.).
PC may designate 1 spell list on which he never needs to make an Extraordinary Spell Failure roll.
PC has an additional set of Power Points based on his PR stat to use with the lists in Future Law. May be developed as if a 'Semi-telepath'.
+15 to PR modification.
+15 to IN modification.
+15 to EM modification.
+15 to ME modification.
+15 to RE modification.
+20 to PR modification.
+20 to IN modification.
+20 to EM modification.
+20 to ME modification.
+20 to RE modification.
+20 to PR, IN, EM, ME, or RE modification (GM choice).

sources.name: Companion II
sources.note: La table des matieres et le contenu montrent des professions optionnelles, des voies des sorts, des regles optionnelles sur les competences, la resolution des actions, le monde des esprits et des descriptions de competences, mais pas de section equivalente a des options d'historique ou a des talents par statistique.

sources.name: Companion III

Group C.selection: 1 C pick or 1 B pick and 2 A picks

general_notes: Abilities are split by stat into Group A, Group B, and Group C.
Some entries are direct references to background options; others are spell-like or unique talents.
Spell-like abilities may be used an unlimited number of times per day unless a limit is stated, but only once per round.

entries.description_en: Unnatural Stamina as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Endurance Surnaturelle comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Tolerance as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Tolérance comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Healing occurs at twice the normal rate.
entries.description_fr: La guérison se fait à un rythme double de la normale.

entries.name_en: No Stat Loss on Level Gain
entries.name_fr: Pas de Perte de Caractéristique au Gain de Niveau
entries.description_en: Stat loss (due to stress) never occurs upon gaining a level; i.e., stat gain rolls of 01-04 are ignored.
entries.description_fr: Aucune perte de caractéristique (due au stress) ne survient lors d’un gain de niveau ; les jets de gain de stat de 01-04 sont ignorés.

entries.description_en: Clotting I as the spell, once per round.
entries.description_fr: Coagulation I comme le sort, utilisable une fois par round.

entries.description_en: Natural Physique as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Physique Naturel comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Pain Relief I as the spell.
entries.description_fr: Pain Relief I comme le sort.

entries.description_en: Major Fracture/Cartilage Repair as the Healer spell.
entries.description_fr: Major Fracture/Cartilage Repair comme le sort du Guérisseur.

entries.description_en: Muscle/Tendon Repair as the Healer spell.
entries.description_fr: Muscle/Tendon Repair comme le sort du Guérisseur.

entries.description_en: Preservation as the Cleric spell, 1 hour per level duration.
entries.description_fr: Préservation comme le sort du Clerc, avec une durée d’une heure par niveau.

entries.description_en: Cut Repair I as the spell.
entries.description_fr: Cut Repair I comme le sort.

entries.description_en: Healing occurs at three times the normal rate (not cumulative with Accelerated Healing I).
entries.description_fr: La guérison se fait à un rythme triple de la normale (non cumulable avec Guérison Accélérée I).

entries.description_en: Skin toughens to AT 3 permanently.
entries.description_fr: Skin toughens to AT 3 permanently.

entries.description_en: Poison/Disease Resistance I as the Open Channeling spell.
entries.description_fr: Poison/Disease Resistance I comme le sort de Théurgie Ouverte.

entries.description_en: Stuns accumulated from each blow taken are reduced by one round.
entries.description_fr: Stuns accumulated from each blow taken are reduced by one round.

entries.description_en: Undisease/Unpoison as the Open Channeling spell, usable 5 times per day.
entries.description_fr: Undisease/Unpoison comme le sort de Théurgie Ouverte, utilisable 5 fois par jour.

entries.description_en: Cancel True as the Closed Essence spell, usable 5 times per day. Alternatively, only one realm may be cancelled but this ability may be used once per round an unlimited number of times per day.
entries.description_fr: Annulation Totale comme le sort d’Essence Fermée, utilisable 5 fois par jour. Variante : un seul royaume peut être annulé, mais cette aptitude peut alors être utilisée une fois par round sans limite quotidienne.

entries.description_en: Major Vessel Repair I as the Healer spell.
entries.description_fr: Major Vessel Repair I comme le sort du Guérisseur.

entries.description_en: Major Fracture Repair True as the Healer spell.
entries.description_fr: Major Fracture Repair True comme le sort du Guérisseur.

entries.description_en: Muscle/Tendon Repair True as the Healer spell.
entries.description_fr: Muscle/Tendon Repair True comme le sort du Guérisseur.

entries.description_en: All criticals taken are reduced one level in severity.
entries.description_fr: Tous les critiques subis sont réduits d’un niveau de gravité.

entries.description_en: Natural Facility with Armor as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Facilité Naturelle avec l'Armure comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Body Control as the Nightblade spell.
entries.description_fr: Body Control comme le sort du Sicaire.

entries.description_en: Landing (10' per level) as the Closed Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Atterrissage (10' par niveau) comme le sort de Mentalisme Fermé.

entries.description_en: Edgerunning as the Monk spell.
entries.description_fr: Edgerunning comme le sort du Moine.

entries.name_fr: Plages de Maladresse Réduites de Moitié
entries.description_en: All fumble ranges are halved (round down).
entries.description_fr: Toutes les plages de maladresse sont réduites de moitié (arrondi à l’inférieur).

entries.description_en: All one-handed melee weapons that character has proficiency in may be used in either or both hands; no cost for this two-weapon combination.
entries.description_fr: Toutes les armes de mêlée à une main maîtrisées peuvent être utilisées dans l’une ou l’autre main, ou dans les deux, sans coût pour cette combinaison de deux armes.

entries.description_en: Weapon Kata penalties are eliminated.
entries.description_fr: Les pénalités de kata d’arme sont supprimées.

entries.description_en: Directed elemental attack spells may be parried using melee OBs and a weapon/shield.
entries.description_fr: Les sorts d’attaque élémentaires dirigés peuvent être parés avec les BA de mêlée et une arme ou un bouclier.

entries.description_en: Agile parrying ability causes opponents to resist vs. character's level or be disarmed if the character uses at least half of his OB to parry.
entries.description_fr: Cette capacité de parade agile force les adversaires à résister contre le niveau du personnage sous peine d’être désarmés, si le personnage consacre au moins la moitié de son OB à la parade.

entries.description_en: Scope Skill (choose directed or nondirected spells); otherwise as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Compétence d'Ampleur comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Penalties for engaging in multiple melee attacks are reduced by 50%.
entries.description_fr: Les pénalités pour attaques de mêlée multiples sont réduites de 50 %.

entries.description_en: All missile, directed spell, or melee criticals delivered increase one level in severity.
entries.description_fr: Tous les critiques infligés par missile, sort dirigé ou attaque de mêlée augmentent d’un niveau de sévérité.

entries.description_en: Open-ended high (OEH) roll range for rolls involving skills that receive an AG bonus becomes 91-100.
entries.description_fr: Open-ended high (OEH) roll range for rolls involving skills that receive an AG bonus becomes 91-100.

entries.description_en: Open-ended low (OEL) range for rolls involving skills that receive an AG bonus becomes 01-02.
entries.description_fr: Open-ended low (OEL) range for rolls involving skills that receive an AG bonus becomes 01-02.

entries.description_en: Courage as the Paladin spell.
entries.description_fr: Courage comme le sort du Paladin.

entries.description_en: Levitation as the Closed Essence spell.
entries.description_fr: Levitation comme le sort d’Essence Fermée.

entries.description_en: Meditation III as the Shaman spell.
entries.description_fr: Meditation III comme le sort du Chaman.

entries.description_en: Unpain 50% as the Open Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Unpain 50% comme le sort de Mentalisme Ouvert.

entries.description_en: When frenzied, defense is normal and crits are reduced one level. A total roll of 116 is needed to achieve this state.
entries.description_fr: En frénésie, la défense reste normale et les critiques subis sont réduits d’un niveau. Un total de 116 est nécessaire pour atteindre cet état.

entries.description_en: Adds +50 to RRs versus any mind-influencing spells.
entries.description_fr: Adds +50 to RRs versus any mind-influencing spells.

entries.description_en: Stuns accumulated from each blow taken are reduced by one round.
entries.description_fr: Stuns accumulated from each blow taken are reduced by one round.

entries.description_en: Concentration II as the Monk spell.
entries.description_fr: Concentration II comme le sort du Moine.

entries.description_en: Unpain 100% as the Open Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Unpain 100% comme le sort de Mentalisme Ouvert.

entries.description_en: Unpresence as the Mystic spell.
entries.description_fr: Unpresence comme le sort du Mystique.

entries.description_en: As Improved Frenzy, but instantaneous spells may be cast while frenzied, crits are reduced two levels, and a roll of 131 must be attained.
entries.description_fr: Comme Frénésie Améliorée, mais les sorts instantanés peuvent être lancés en frénésie, les critiques sont réduits de deux niveaux et un résultat total de 131 est requis.

entries.description_en: Mountain Heart I as the Nightblade spell, usable 3 times per day.
entries.description_fr: Mountain Heart I comme le sort du Sicaire, utilisable 3 fois par jour.

entries.description_en: Temporal Skill as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Compétence Temporelle comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Additional +15 bonus to all RRs that can be actively resisted (i.e., nonsubtle attacks).
entries.description_fr: Bonus supplémentaire de +15 à tous les jets de résistance pouvant être activement résistés (attaques non subtiles).

entries.description_en: Self-Keeping as the Monk spell.
entries.description_fr: Self-Keeping comme le sort du Moine.

entries.description_en: Total Recall as the Closed Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Total Recall comme le sort de Mentalisme Fermé.

entries.description_en: All languages are learned at half-cost (and time).
entries.description_fr: Toutes les langues s’apprennent à demi-coût (et en moitié moins de temps).

entries.description_en: Study I as the Bard spell.
entries.description_fr: Study I comme le sort du Barde.

entries.description_en: Permanent 5% bonus to all earned experience.
entries.description_fr: Bonus permanent de 5 % à toute l’expérience gagnée.

entries.description_en: Allows two chosen skills to be developed at half cost, subject to GM approval. Skills must be specific; examples: martial arts striking, a certain spell list, or acrobatics.
entries.description_fr: Permet de développer deux compétences choisies à demi-coût, sous réserve de l’approbation du MJ. Les compétences doivent être spécifiques : par exemple, frappe d’arts martiaux, une liste de sorts précise ou acrobatie.

entries.description_en: Subconscious Discipline as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Discipline Subconsciente comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Spell Store as the Closed Essence spell, except one other spell may be cast before the stored spell.
entries.description_fr: Stockage de Sort comme le sort d’Essence Fermée, sauf qu’un autre sort peut être lancé avant le sort stocké.

entries.description_en: Permanent 10% bonus to earned experience (noncumulative with Earned Experience +5%).
entries.description_fr: Bonus permanent de 10 % à l’expérience gagnée (non cumulable avec Expérience Gagnée +5 %).

entries.description_en: Permanent 15% bonus to earned experience (noncumulative with lower experience bonuses).
entries.description_fr: Bonus permanent de 15 % à l’expérience gagnée (non cumulable avec les bonus d’expérience inférieurs).

entries.description_en: Permanent +10 bonus to all actions that must have been previously seen or attempted.
entries.description_fr: Bonus permanent de +10 à toutes les actions qui doivent avoir déjà été vues ou tentées auparavant.

entries.description_en: Tactician as the background option (substitute reasoning for intuition).
entries.description_fr: Tacticien comme l’option d’historique, en remplaçant l’Intuition par le Raisonnement.

entries.description_en: Judge of Weaponry as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Juge des Armes comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Detect Lie (50% chance per lie).
entries.description_fr: Détection de Mensonge (50% de chances par mensonge).

entries.description_en: Observation as the Closed Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Observation comme le sort de Mentalisme Fermé.

entries.description_en: Calculate II as the Sage spell.
entries.description_fr: Calculate II comme le sort du Sage.

entries.description_en: Awareness as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Awareness comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Clever attacking strategies increase effectiveness of martial art ranks used by one factor.
entries.description_fr: Clever attacking strategies increase effectiveness of martial art ranks used by one factor.

entries.description_en: Correlate as the Closed Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Correlate comme le sort de Mentalisme Fermé.

entries.description_en: Detect Illusion as the Monk spell.
entries.description_fr: Detect Illusion comme le sort du Moine.

entries.description_en: Calculate III as the Sage spell.
entries.description_fr: Calculate III comme le sort du Sage.

entries.description_en: Weigh Decision (45% bias) as the Sage spell.
entries.description_fr: Weigh Decision (45% bias) comme le sort du Sage.

entries.description_en: Ambush skill rank increases 50% and is one-half cost thereafter.
entries.description_fr: Ambush skill rank increases 50% and is one-half cost thereafter.

entries.description_en: Awareness True as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Awareness True comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Complete understanding of one race allows crits against the race to be 'Slaying'.
entries.description_fr: La compréhension totale d’une race permet que les critiques portés contre cette race soient considérés comme des critiques de type Tueur.

entries.description_en: Armor minimum maneuver penalties are halved.
entries.description_fr: Armor minimum maneuver penalties are halved.

entries.description_en: Hammerhand as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Main de Marteau comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: All missile ranges increase 50%.
entries.description_fr: Toutes les portées de projectiles augmentent de 50 %.

entries.description_en: Criticals delivered also yield Unbalancing crits (2 degrees less severity).
entries.description_fr: Criticals delivered also yield Unbalancing crits (2 degrees less severity).

entries.description_en: Allows 2-handed weapons to be wielded in one hand at a -25 penalty. Two-weapon combo is unusable when employing this ability.
entries.description_fr: Allows 2-handed weapons to be wielded in one hand at a -25 penalty. Two-weapon combo is unusable when employing this ability.

entries.description_en: Yields Krush crits the following round after grappling a target.
entries.description_fr: Produit des critiques de type Écrasement au round suivant une prise de corps à corps réussie.

entries.description_en: All melee strikes yield double concussion damage.
entries.description_fr: Toutes les frappes de mêlée infligent des dégâts de concussion doublés.

entries.description_en: All missile strikes yield double concussion damage.
entries.description_fr: Toutes les attaques de projectiles infligent des dégâts de concussion doublés.

entries.description_en: May throw objects as a giant would, with a 200' range. Skill must be developed.
entries.description_fr: Permet de lancer des objets comme un géant, avec une portée de 200'. La compétence doit être développée.

entries.description_en: 50% of all strikes made with blunt weapons are 'Shattering'.
entries.description_fr: 50% de toutes les frappes réalisées avec des armes contondantes sont de type Brisant.

entries.description_en: Yields ability to throw weight into blows, inflicting additional Impact crits in melee.
entries.description_fr: Yields ability to throw weight into blows, inflicting additional Impact crits in melee.

entries.name_fr: Brise les Objets de Force Mithril
entries.description_en: Items as strong as Mithril may be bent/broken if the item fails an RR.
entries.description_fr: Des objets aussi résistants que le Mithril peuvent être tordus ou brisés si l’objet échoue à un JR.

entries.description_en: 50% of all strikes made with edged weapons are 'Cleaving'.
entries.description_fr: 50% de toutes les frappes réalisées avec des armes tranchantes sont de type Tranchant majeur.

entries.description_en: Adds +5 to all OBs and non-rear DBs (includes DB versus elemental attack spells).
entries.description_fr: Ajoute +5 à tous les BA et aux BD hors arrière (y compris contre les sorts d’attaque élémentaires).

entries.description_en: Allow negation of 1 surprise or disorientation round.
entries.description_fr: Allow negation of 1 surprise or disorientation round.

entries.description_en: Subtracts 5 from all criticals taken if the character is aware of the attack.
entries.description_fr: Réduit de 5 tous les critiques subis si le personnage est conscient de l’attaque.

entries.description_en: Gives an additional 10% activity each round.
entries.description_fr: Gives an additional 10% activity each round.

entries.description_en: Ability to change facing in melee prevents the character from being flanked/attacked from rear by less than 3 opponents if aware of them.
entries.description_fr: La capacité à changer de face en mêlée empêche le personnage d’être débordé ou attaqué de dos par moins de 3 adversaires, s’il a conscience de leur présence.

entries.description_en: As Fluidity, but the bonus is +10 instead of +5.
entries.description_fr: Comme Fluidité, mais le bonus est de +10 au lieu de +5.

entries.name_fr: Annulation de la Rapidité/Défense Adrénale Adverse
entries.description_en: Opponent's Quickness and/or adrenal defense may be negated 50% of the time if the opponent possesses quickness below 102.
entries.description_fr: La Rapidité et/ou la Défense Adrénale de l’adversaire peuvent être annulées 50% du temps si l’adversaire possède une Rapidité inférieure à 102.

entries.description_en: Character may act one combat phase earlier (e.g. fire a missile in the spell phase); a penalty of -30 to first swing points (FSP) is applied when this ability is used.
entries.description_fr: Le personnage peut agir une phase de combat plus tôt (par ex. tirer un projectile pendant la phase des sorts) ; une pénalité de -30 aux points de premier coup (FSP) s’applique lorsqu’il utilise cette aptitude.

entries.description_en: As Efficiency, but the additional activity is 20%.
entries.description_fr: Comme Efficacité, mais l’activité supplémentaire est de 20%.

entries.description_en: As Fluidity, but the bonus is +15 instead of +5.
entries.description_fr: Comme Fluidité, mais le bonus est de +15 au lieu de +5.

entries.description_en: Dodging III as the Monk spell.
entries.description_fr: Dodging III comme le sort du Moine.

entries.description_en: Spell Dodge II as the Nightblade spell.
entries.description_fr: Spell Dodge II comme le sort du Sicaire.

entries.description_en: As Efficiency, but the additional activity is 40%.
entries.description_fr: Comme Efficacité, mais l’activité supplémentaire est de 40%.

entries.description_en: Look of Eagles as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Regard d'Aigle comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Suggestion as the Closed Essence spell; targets gain a +30 to resist.
entries.description_fr: Suggestion comme le sort d’Essence Fermée ; les cibles gagnent un bonus de +30 pour résister.

entries.description_en: Mind Merge as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Mind Merge comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Mind Shield as the Open Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Mind Shield comme le sort de Mentalisme Ouvert.

entries.description_en: Inner Thoughts as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Inner Thoughts comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Mind Voice 100' as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Voix Mentale 100' comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Look of Terror I as the Warlock spell.
entries.description_fr: Look of Terror I comme le sort du Démoniste.

entries.description_en: Aggression as the background option, except it applies to all attack rolls.
entries.description_fr: Agression comme l’option d’historique, sauf qu’elle s’applique à tous les jets d’attaque.

entries.description_en: Inner Wall V as the Closed Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Inner Wall V comme le sort de Mentalisme Fermé.

entries.description_en: Aura as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Aura comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Lifekeeping (1 hour per level) as the Cleric spell.
entries.description_fr: Conservation de la Vie (1 heure par niveau) comme le sort du Clerc.

entries.description_en: Charm Kind as the Mentalist spell; targets gain a +30 to RRs.
entries.description_fr: Charme des Créatures comme le sort du Mentaliste ; les cibles gagnent un bonus de +30 aux JR.

entries.description_en: Hold Kind as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Hold Kind comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Inspirations II as the Paladin spell.
entries.description_fr: Inspirations II comme le sort du Paladin.

entries.description_en: Misfeel True as the Mystic spell.
entries.description_fr: Misfeel True comme le sort du Mystique.

entries.description_en: Control Demon V as the Evil Magician spell.
entries.description_fr: Control Demon V comme le sort du Magicien Maléfique.

entries.description_en: Master of Kind as the Mentalist spell; targets gain a +30 to RRs.
entries.description_fr: Maîtrise des Créatures comme le sort du Mentaliste ; les cibles gagnent un bonus de +30 aux JR.

entries.description_en: Ability to externalize mind force allows the caster to simulate the effects of the Mentalist spell Shock E twice per day. Alternatively, 'Shattering' may be used.
entries.description_fr: La capacité d’extérioriser la force mentale permet au lanceur de simuler les effets du sort Choc E du Mentaliste deux fois par jour. Variante : le type Brisant peut être utilisé.

entries.description_en: Dream I as the Cleric spell.
entries.description_fr: Dream I comme le sort du Clerc.

entries.description_en: Divination as the secondary skill, 80% chance of success.
entries.description_fr: Divination comme compétence secondaire, avec 80% de chances de réussite.

entries.description_en: Direction Sense as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Sens de la Direction comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Guess as the Cleric spell.
entries.description_fr: Guess comme le sort du Clerc.

entries.description_en: Provides a +50 bonus to the skill Spatial Location Awareness.
entries.description_fr: Accorde un bonus de +50 à la compétence Conscience de la Position Spatiale.

entries.description_en: Intuitive understanding of the near future bestows a +10 bonus to all DBs, including rear DBs.
entries.description_fr: Une compréhension intuitive du futur proche confère un bonus de +10 à toutes les BD, y compris de dos.

entries.description_en: Awakening as the Monk spell.
entries.description_fr: Awakening comme le sort du Moine.

entries.description_en: Intuitions V as the Cleric spell.
entries.description_fr: Intuitions V comme le sort du Clerc.

entries.description_en: Detect Ambush as the Ranger spell.
entries.description_fr: Detect Ambush comme le sort du Rôdeur.

entries.description_en: Channel Opening (10 miles per level) as the Cleric spell.
entries.description_fr: Ouverture de Canal (10 miles par niveau) comme le sort du Clerc.

entries.description_en: Luck as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Chance comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Destiny Sense as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Sens du Destin comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Dangersense as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Sens du Danger comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: A special tie to deity allows use of the Dervish spell Dance of Fervor once per week.
entries.description_fr: Un lien particulier avec une divinité permet d’utiliser le sort de Derviche Danse de Ferveur une fois par semaine.

entries.description_en: Anticipate True as the Open Mentalism spell.
entries.description_fr: Anticipate True comme le sort de Mentalisme Ouvert.

entries.description_en: Animal Friendship as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Amitié Animale comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Mind Typing as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Mind Typing comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Emotions as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Emotions comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: As Detect Channeling, but applies to all realms.
entries.description_fr: Comme Détection de Théurgie, mais s’applique à tous les royaumes.

entries.description_en: Mana Sensing as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Perception du Mana comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Presence, Feel, and Mind Store as the Mentalist spells.
entries.description_fr: Presence, Feel, and Mind Store comme le sort du Mentaliste spells.

entries.description_en: Location 500' as the Open Channeling spell.
entries.description_fr: Localisation 500' comme le sort de Théurgie Ouverte.

entries.description_en: Visions as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Visions comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Mana Reading as the background option, except there is only a 50% chance for each ability.
entries.description_fr: Lecture de Mana comme l’option d’historique, sauf qu’il n’y a que 50% de chances pour chaque capacité.

entries.description_en: Awareness as the Mentalist spell.
entries.description_fr: Awareness comme le sort du Mentaliste.

entries.description_en: Neutralize Curse (1 minute per level) as the Cleric spell.
entries.description_fr: Neutralisation de Malédiction (1 minute par niveau) comme le sort du Clerc.

entries.description_en: Analysis as the Open Essence spell.
entries.description_fr: Analysis comme le sort d’Essence Ouverte.

entries.description_en: Transcendence as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Transcendance comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Spatial Skill as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Compétence Spatiale comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Detect True as the Open Essence spell.
entries.description_fr: Detect True comme le sort d’Essence Ouverte.

entries.description_en: Ensorcellment Cure as the background option.
entries.description_fr: Guérison d'Ensorcellement comme l'option d'historique.

entries.description_en: Power may be leeched from an earthnode, item, or person imbued with Essence power; rate of drain is 10 PP per round and user must make a BAR vs unwilling targets, who then make an RR to attempt to resist the draining. Concentration must be maintained during each round of the drain.
entries.description_fr: Le pouvoir peut être siphonné depuis un nœud tellurique, un objet ou une personne imprégnée d’Essence ; le rythme est de 10 PP par round et l’utilisateur doit effectuer une BAR contre les cibles non consentantes, qui effectuent ensuite un JR pour tenter de résister au drainage. La concentration doit être maintenue à chaque round du drain.
